cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
My friends are my power
WG 1GW 3 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Target creature gains +X/+X where X is the total power of up to two other creatures you control until end of turn.
Hades Cup
B 3B 4 Battle - Siege Battle 4
1 When Hades Cup is defeated defending player becomes the Loser. Whenever one or more creatures attack Hades Cup, defending player may pay 2 life to create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token tapped and blocking. Destroy it at end of combat.
Olympus Cup
W 3W 4 Battle Battle 4
1 While you control Olympus Cup you are the Monarch. Whenever one or more creatures attack Olympus Cup you may create a 0/1 colorless artifact creature token named “Barrel” tapped and blocking. Destroy it at end of combat.
One sky on destiny
WU WU 2 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Scry 2, then you and target opponent draw a card. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom of your library and the rest on top in any order.)
Strike Raid
1 1 Sorcery - Action-Ability Sorcery
3 Target creature gains and range until end of turn. (When this creature attacks it takes no damage from creatures without range or reach.)
Ars Arcanum
1 1 Sorcery - Action-Ability Sorcery
3 Target creature gains menace until end of turn. (That creature can’t be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Ragnarok
2 2 Sorcery - Action-Ability Sorcery
3 Target creature gains splash damage 1 until end of turn. (When this creature deals damage to a creature, deal 1 damage to other creatures that player controls.)
Sonic Blade
1 1 Sorcery - Action-Ability Sorcery
3 Target creature gains trample until end of turn. (That creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it’s attacking.)
Fight Fire with Sparks
2 2 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Destroy target artifact.
Attack the Barrel
U 1U 2 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Destroy target artifact, then tap target creature.
Red Trinity
R 1R 2 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Chose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Deal 2 damage to target creature token.
Undying Wickedness
B 4B 5 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Target black creature from your graveyard, put it on the battlefield. That creature gains haste. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
Restoring Sleep
3 3 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Target creature you control loses all its abilities, then it gains all abilities of target creature you control.
Tokens</-->
